confidence_notes: Extracted skills from concrete work experience at Atelia Software (Python, JavaScript, Java, Machine Learning) and GitHub projects (HTML, Java). projects.name: AI Scribe for Physician-Patient Consultations
projects.summary: Built AI models to automatically summarize physician-patient consultations, helping doctors save time. Developed machine learning models for patient data processing using Java and Python/JavaScript libraries.

projects.name: Teacher Filtering Tool
projects.summary: Developed a web-based filtering tool allowing students to select teachers best suited for them across campus. Demonstrates both frontend (HTML) and backend logic (Java).

projects.name: Historical Decolonization Website
projects.summary: Created a website explaining the historical process of decolonization. Static informational site focused on content presentation.

projects.name: NFL Draft Simulation Game
projects.summary: Interactive game allowing users to control their favorite NFL team's 2021 draft picks and visualize how different player selections would impact the team today. Combines game logic with historical sports data.

impact_highlights.description: Built AI scribe system at Atelia Software to automatically summarize physician-patient consultations, directly addressing the client goal of saving doctors' time.
